title: Junior App Marketing Manager (m/f/d)
missing_skills: Mobile app attribution tools (e.g. Adjust, AppsFlyer)
core_responsibilities: Execute app user acquisition campaigns across Google Ads, Apple Search Ads, Meta and TikTok
Set up and optimise CRM campaigns (push-notification, in-app, inbox) for retention and CLV
Monitor and optimise campaign performance, attribution and funnel KPIs with analytics/product/tech teams
Contribute to A/B testing across creatives, audiences and messaging
Prepare app performance reports and translate data into actionable learnings
recommended_emphasis: Highlight A/B testing and experiment design experience explicitly
Emphasise funnel analysis and conversion tracking work (Hapag-Lloyd, Moli Media)
Lead with campaign performance analytics and ROI measurement from Intelligent Power and GRG Banking
Reframe e-commerce and digital campaign analytics as transferable to app marketing context
Tone down seniority signals (C-level, PMO, USD 8M programme) — they signal overqualification for a junior role
If any exposure to paid digital platforms (Google, Meta) exists even informally, surface it explicitly

overqualification_flag.reason: Candidate has 4+ years experience, two Master's degrees, and held Manager/PMO titles. Role targets candidates within first 2 years of career. Risk of rejection on overqualification grounds regardless of skill alignment.
